title: matricaria lacustris
intro: Matricaria lacustris, also known as lake mayweed or marsh fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Matricaria lacustris include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and ease respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Matricaria lacustris can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
